requirements.title: DJB2 Hash Computation
requirements.description: The hash module shall compute the djb2 hash over a byte buffer with initial seed 5381.
requirements.rationale: DJB2 is a simple, fast hash function suitable for hash map key distribution in resource-constrained environments where cryptographic strength is not required.

requirements.title: DJB2 Null Buffer Rejection
requirements.description: The hash module shall return JUNO_STATUS_NULLPTR_ERROR when passed a NULL data pointer.
requirements.rationale: Rejecting NULL input prevents undefined behavior from dereferencing an invalid buffer pointer, ensuring runtime memory safety.

requirements.title: DJB2 Result Type
requirements.description: The hash module shall return the hash value in a result type combining a status code with a size_t payload.
requirements.rationale: Returning the hash in a result type couples the computed value with a status code, enabling callers to distinguish between a valid hash and an error without ambiguity.
